title: Endeavour MTR Reopened
description: Modpack for a Minecraft server named Endeavour MTR Reopened, Please do not use this for other Minecraft servers or singleplayer.
body:
Endeavour MTR was an semi-realistic server with the intent of giving liberty to the citizens and builders of its world.
*if one of these situations apply to you , try joining our server!*
- you like to make countries in minecraft
- you like building railways in mtr/create
- you like designing and constructing buildings
- you like building roads
- you like creating an countries
- you like having fun while doing any of those things
The possibilities are limitless.
